articles.title: Tectonic shift: Earth was already moving 3.5 billion years ago

articles.title: Scientists turn probiotic bacteria into tumor-hunting cancer killers
articles.description: Scientists have engineered probiotic bacteria to act as tumor-seeking drug factories. articles.title: Your local soccer field could be killing salmon: UBC study
articles.description: A University of B.C. study has shown that the chemicals used in old tires that have been recycled into artificial turf fields end up in waterways, and are proven lethal to Coho salmon and some trout species.
